programme.title: A Family Christmas Gift
programme.desc: When Amber spends the holidays with her Aunt Dora and helps plan a fundraising Christmas Concert, it brings Amber closer to her aunt and a new love into her life.

programme.title: Finding Father Christmas
programme.desc: Three days before Christmas, a woman who has never known her father receives a clue concerning his whereabouts. She follows the trail to a beautiful New England town where she meets a handsome young man willing to help with the search.

programme.title: The Santa Suit
programme.desc: Drake Hunter has a plan to boost sales for his father's toy company.

programme.title: Hitched for the Holidays
programme.desc: A man (Joey Lawrence) and a woman (Emily Hampshire) pose as a couple to fool their respective families.

programme.title: The National Tree
programme.desc: A man (Andrew McCarthy) and his son (Evan Williams) embark on a cross-country road trip to transport a Christmas tree to Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The National Tree
programme.desc: A man (Andrew McCarthy) and his son (Evan Williams) embark on a cross-country road trip to transport a Christmas tree to Washington, D.C.

programme.title: A Dog Named Christmas
programme.desc: A mentally challenged man (Noel Fisher) embarks on a mission to find homes for dogs during the holidays.

programme.title: Debbie Macomber's Mr. Miracle
programme.desc: At Christmastime, angel-in-training Harry Mills (Rob Morrow) helps an insecure college student (Britt Irvin) realize her purpose in life.

programme.title: Christmas Festival of Ice
programme.desc: Emma is determined to keep her hometown's Christmas ice-sculpting contest going. She enlists sponsors and artists, but Nick, the town's ace artisan, isn't interested in competing until he sees what Emma has accomplished.

programme.title: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: When Belinda heads to her hometown for the holidays, things get complicated when she is forced to team up with her ex-boyfriend Dustin for the town's annual Christmas scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: A high-powered Los Angeles lawyer returns to his deceased father's home.

programme.title: Northpole
programme.desc: When the power supply to Santa's city is threatened by a lack of holiday spirit, a youngster tries to help his busy mother rediscover the joys of the holiday season.

programme.title: I'll Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Jackie, a single mom and attorney, looks forward to spending Christmas alone with her daughter. Everything goes according to plan until Jackie's estranged father shows up on her door step.

programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife (Mary-Louise Parker), a man (Andy Garcia) plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: A Season for Miracles
programme.desc: A woman (Carla Gugino) tries to save her sister's (Laura Dern) children from foster care by taking them to a small town where she is mistaken for a missing heiress.

programme.title: Love Always, Santa
programme.desc: Celia's daughter Lilly makes a wish for her this Christmas, to find love again.

programme.title: A Gingerbread Romance
programme.desc: An architect begins to find herself longing for a place to call her own as she works alongside a baker to win a gingerbead house contest.

programme.title: A Midnight Kiss
programme.desc: With only one week to prepare, party planners land the biggest job in their company's history: a New Year's Eve party for a famous tech entrepreneur.

programme.title: A Majestic Christmas
programme.desc: An architect returns to her hometown during the holidays to turn a historic playhouse into a modern multiplex, much to the town's objections.
